tariff.header_description: Centralized tariff catalog for the next master-quoter and quoter flow.
tariff.soft_warning_type: Select a type first so the form can unlock the correct rules.
tariff.soft_warning_mode: Select a pricing mode so the system knows how this item will be calculated later.
tariff.soft_warning_ranges: PER_PAX_RANGE is selected but there are no pax ranges yet.
tariff.soft_warning_rooms: PER_ROOM is selected but there are no room rates configured yet.
tariff.soft_warning_seasons: PER_SEASON is selected but there are no seasons configured yet.
tariff.soft_warning_custom: CUSTOM pricing is selected but there is no custom JSON yet.
tariff.soft_warning_children: No child policies configured. This is fine if children pay the same as adults.
tariff.soft_warning_year: Validity year is empty. The pricing engine expects a year.
tariff.hint_provider_required: This type requires Provider because the supplier identity matters operationally.
tariff.hint_provider: Provider: the commercial supplier or brand that sells the service.
tariff.hint_subtype: Subtype: an internal classification like room category, excursion style, service class, or route variant.
tariff.hint_location: Location: use it for a more precise place than city, such as station, neighborhood, port, or hotel zone.
tariff.hint_tags: Tags: searchable labels for your team, separated by commas.
tariff.hint_status_active: Status and Active: DRAFT is still being built; ACTIVE means it is ready to be used in quoting.

family.solo_traveler_help: Optional. Use when 1 pax should pay a different amount than the normal price.
family.guide_price_help: Optional extra used only when the quote includes guide cost.
family.price_per_person_help: Turn this on when the range price should be multiplied by the number of pax.
family.range_row_help: Define the pax interval that this price covers. Vehicle type is optional unless transport logistics matter.
family.custom_json_help: Use custom JSON only when this product cannot be represented with normal modes. Keep it simple and documented.
family.child_policy_help_1: Use child policies only if children do not pay the same as adults.
family.child_policy_help_2: Discount percent reduces the adult reference price.
family.child_policy_row_help: FIXED and PER_PERSON set a direct child amount. DISCOUNT_PERCENT reduces the adult reference price.
family.activity_help_1: Use Base price when the activity has one standard price per person or group.
family.activity_help_2: Use Pax ranges when the price changes depending on the size of the group.
family.activity_help_3: Price per person means the selected range price is multiplied by pax later.
family.activity_content_help_1: Description and remarks help sales understand what is included.
family.activity_content_help_2: General info JSON is optional for extra structured details.
family.hotel_help_1: Room name is the commercial room label the user will later choose.
family.hotel_help_2: Confidential is your internal negotiated rate.
family.hotel_help_3: Rack is the public or reference rate.
family.hotel_content_help_1: Use content to describe the property, not to store prices.
family.hotel_content_help_2: Cancellation policy is especially useful for operations and sales.
family.hotel_child_help: Only add child policies if the hotel contract really has child-specific rules.
family.transport_help_1: Use Pax ranges when price changes by group size.
family.transport_help_2: Vehicle type helps the engine choose the right transport for the pax count.
family.transport_help_3: Vehicle rates are useful for custom transport where each vehicle has a flat amount.
family.transport_range_help: Set the exact price for that pax interval. Vehicle type helps the system explain or choose the correct transport later.
family.custom_transport_help: Use custom JSON only for exceptional transport logic that cannot be modeled with ranges or flat vehicle prices.
family.vehicle_rate_help: Use this when each vehicle has a fixed transport amount regardless of pax range.
family.transport_content_help: Schedules and duration are useful when the transport has fixed departure logic.
family.train_help_1: Adult price is the main train fare for that season.
family.train_help_2: Child and guide prices are optional supplements used only when needed.
family.train_row_help: Adult price is the main fare. Child and guide are only used if those passengers or guide costs exist in the quote.
family.train_content_help: Use content for route and service details; prices stay in the season matrix.
family.validity_help_1: Year is important because pricing will reject quotes outside that year.
family.validity_help_2: Special dates add, replace or close pricing for exact dates.
family.validity_help_3: Closing dates block sales on dates where the service is unavailable.
family.validity_window_help: If you set dateFrom and dateTo, the tariff is only usable inside that date window and also inside the selected year.
family.special_date_help: ADD increases the normal amount, REPLACE substitutes it, and CLOSE blocks the item on that date.
family.closing_date_help: Use closing dates when the service cannot be sold at all on that date.
